th th
Rahu, the native‟s father will die in the 7 , or the 19 year of the native.
th
The native in his 44 year will lose his father, if Dharm‟s Lord is in Vyaya,
as Vyaya‟s Lord is in Dharm. If Lagn‟s Lord is in Randhr Bhava, as Candr is
th st
in Sūrya‟s Navāńś, the native in his 35 , or 41 year will lose his father.
th
One will lose his father in the 50 year, if Sūrya, being the Lord of Dharm,
th
is conjunct Mangal and Śani. If Sūrya is in the 7 from Dharm Bhava, as
th th th
Rahu is in the 7 from Sahaj Bhava, the 6 , or 25 year of the native will be
th th
fatal for father. If Śani is in the 7 from Randhr Bhava, as Sūrya is in the 7
from Śani, the ages of 21, 26, or 30 will be fatal for the father. If Dharm‟s
Lord is in its debilitation Rāśi, while his dispositor is in Dharm Bhava, the
native will lose his father at the age of 26, or 30. Thus the Jyotishis may
know the effects.
26. Fortunes.
